channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.22 (Build 20260602)
item.description:
What's New

fix(injection): prevent diacritic loss in Office for the web

Word/Excel/PowerPoint Online (WAC editing surface) holds characters

injected via the default .fast synthetic key events in a provisional

state and discards them when the surface loses focus (clicking a blank

area) or autosave normalizes the DOM, deleting the just-typed Vietnamese

text.

Add a built-in Window Title Rule matched by DOM class (WACEditing /

EditingSurfaceBody) that switches Office for the web to slow + one-by-one

injection (same strategy as Google Docs), giving the editor time to

commit each character.

Also disambiguate the three rule badges that all read "AX":

  • matching-condition badge -> "AX Detection"
  • force-accessibility badge -> "Force AX"
  • axDirect injection method -> "AXDirect"

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
